rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 19, 2011, line 3, CROSS-DEFENDANT DORVIN D. LEIS CO., INC. MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 21, 2011. ALL PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. SEE SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS WEISEL VS. RYAN ASSOCIATES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 19, 2011, line 3, CROSS-DEFENDANT FIRST GLASS, INC. Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. DENIED. CROSS-DEFENDANT SIGNED A SUBCONTRACT THAT INCORPORATED THE GENERAL CONTRACT BETWEEN CROSS-COMPLAINANT AND PLAINTIFF. SUBCONTRACTOR AGREED THAT IT WAS FAMILIAR WITH THE GENERAL CONTRACT AND ALL ITS TERMS AND AGREED THAT THEY ARE INCLUDED IN THE SUBCONTRACT. THE GENERAL CONTRACT INCLUDED A FORUM SELECTION CLAUSE SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFYING SAN FRANCISCO, CA AS THE PROPER FORUM FOR ALL DISPUTES RESULTING IN ARBITRATION OR LITIGATION. THIS FORUM SELECTION CLAUSE IS VALID AND ENFORCEABLE. =(302/CWW)
